news.title: Empower Semiconductor Highlights its Breakthrough AI Vertical Power Delivery Platform at APEC 2025
news.summary: Empower Semiconductor showcases its scalable on-demand true vertical power architecture for AI and high-performance computing processors, featuring proprietary FinFast technology that integrates all power components into a single ultra-thin device.

news.title: Valens Semiconductor Partners to Revolutionize AI Robotics
news.summary: Valens Semiconductor announces partnership with RGo Robotics and CHERRY Embedded Solutions to enhance AI robotic systems, integrating advanced technologies to improve design flexibility and cost-efficiency for mobile machine manufacturers.

news.title: Ainos and ASE Partner to Power AI Scent Digitization in Semiconductor Manufacturing
news.summary: Ainos partners with Advanced Semiconductor Engineering to implement AI nose technology in semiconductor manufacturing, improving accuracy in hygiene monitoring and quality control processes.

news.title: Navitas Semiconductor Surges 200% on Breakthrough Chip Technology
news.summary: Navitas Semiconductor stock rises over 200% following announcement of breakthrough power chip technology that enhances energy efficiency and reduces costs for AI data centers and industrial applications.

news.title: Akeyless Unveils Breakthrough Solution to Secure AI Agent Identities
news.summary: Akeyless announces a breakthrough security solution for AI agent identities, providing centralized control and infrastructure management for agentic AI systems across cloud and data center environments.

news.title: OpenAI Expands AI Support in India with First Solutions Architect Hire
news.summary: OpenAI hires former AuraML co-founder as first Solutions Architect in India, marking strategic expansion to help Indian startups scale AI from prototype to production.

news.title: Breakthrough Soft Robotics Could Redefine Artificial Heart Technology
news.summary: Researchers develop breakthrough soft robotics technology that could revolutionize artificial heart design, creating more functional and adaptable solutions for end-stage heart failure patients.

news.title: Quantum Computing Firm Quantinuum Valued at $5 Billion After Latest Fundraise
news.summary: Quantinuum raises $300 million in equity funding, reaching $5 billion valuation with participation from JPMorgan Chase, Mitsui & Co, and Amgen, bringing total capital raised to $625 million.

news.title: Microsoft and Quantinuum Claim Breakthrough in Quantum Computing Reliability
news.summary: Microsoft and Quantinuum achieve significant milestone in quantum computing reliability, marking progress toward commercial quantum computing applications.

news.title: Google Reveals Quantum Computing Chip with Breakthrough Achievements
news.summary: Google announces Willow quantum computing chip capable of performing complex calculations in 5 minutes that would take supercomputers 10 septillion years to complete.
